name: ScreenCloud
tagline: Simple, powerful digital signage for any screen
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage CMS with enterprise security, remote device management, and 80+ app integrations. Used by 10,000+ screens worldwide.
longDescription: ScreenCloud is a cloud-based digital signage platform that makes it easy to create, schedule, and manage content across any screen. Features include drag-and-drop content creation, 80+ integrations (Slack, Google, Power BI), enterprise-grade security with SSO, remote device management, and real-time content updates. Supports Android, Chrome OS, Fire TV, and proprietary players.

name: BrightSign
tagline: The global market leader in digital signage media players
shortDescription: Industry-leading solid-state media players for digital signage. Purpose-built hardware with BrightAuthor:connected cloud platform for content management.
longDescription: BrightSign is the global market leader in digital signage media players, offering the most reliable, secure, and cost-effective players available. Their product line ranges from entry-level HD players to 8K-capable units. BrightAuthor:connected provides cloud-based content creation, scheduling, and device management. Supports HTML5, video, live TV, and interactive touch.

name: Rise Vision
tagline: Free digital signage software for schools and businesses
shortDescription: Open-source digital signage platform with a generous free tier. Popular with schools and small businesses for digital menu boards, directories, and announcements.
longDescription: Rise Vision offers free digital signage software that runs on Chrome OS, Windows, and Raspberry Pi. Features include hundreds of free templates, real-time data widgets (weather, RSS, social media), scheduling, and remote management. The platform is especially popular in education, with dedicated school templates and Google Workspace integration.

name: Samsung Business Displays
tagline: Professional displays for every digital signage application
shortDescription: Full range of commercial displays from video walls to outdoor signage. Built-in Tizen SoC media player with MagicINFO content management platform.
longDescription: Samsung's commercial display division offers a comprehensive lineup including indoor LED signage, outdoor displays, video walls, interactive displays, and transparent OLED. The built-in Tizen System-on-Chip eliminates the need for external media players. MagicINFO provides enterprise content management with scheduling, remote monitoring, and device management.

name: LG Business Solutions
tagline: Commercial displays with webOS and SuperSign software
shortDescription: Professional display solutions including LED, OLED, and transparent displays. webOS built-in platform with SuperSign CMS supporting up to 1,000 screens.
longDescription: LG Business Solutions delivers commercial-grade displays with built-in webOS platform. SuperSign CMS supports content creation, scheduling, and management for up to 1,000 displays. Product line includes standard signage, OLED, transparent OLED, ultra-stretch, outdoor, and LED. ProCentric for hospitality offers hotel TV and guest-facing solutions.

name: Mvix
shortDescription: Enterprise digital signage CMS with 500+ templates, data integrations, and AI-powered content scheduling. Trusted by Fortune 500 companies.
longDescription: Mvix offers an award-winning cloud-based digital signage platform used by schools, corporate offices, retail stores, hospitals, and manufacturing facilities worldwide. Features include 500+ templates, drag-and-drop editor, data-driven content with 100+ integrations, AI scheduling, interactive touch support, and SCORM-compliant training content.

name: NoviSign
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage with drag-and-drop content creation, real-time widgets, and multi-screen management. Android and Chrome OS compatible.
longDescription: NoviSign provides an intuitive cloud-based digital signage solution that simplifies content creation and management. Features include a drag-and-drop editor with rich media support, real-time widgets (weather, social media, calendars), playlist scheduling, and remote device monitoring. Supports Android media players, Chrome OS, and Windows.

name: Scala
tagline: Enterprise digital signage and digital experience platform
shortDescription: End-to-end digital signage platform combining content management, media playback, data integration, and analytics for enterprise deployments.
longDescription: Scala, a STRATACACHE company, delivers an enterprise-grade digital experience platform for creating, managing, and measuring digital signage networks. Features include content management with workflow approval, data-triggered content, audience measurement analytics, and multi-zone interactive layouts. Deployed in 100+ countries across retail, corporate, healthcare, and transportation.

name: Signagelive
shortDescription: Enterprise cloud digital signage with multi-platform support, proof of play reporting, and API-first architecture for custom integrations.
longDescription: Signagelive is a cloud-native digital signage platform supporting Samsung Tizen, LG webOS, BrightSign, Chrome OS, and Windows players. Features include content scheduling, proof-of-play reporting, multi-site management, API integrations, and SCORM support. Used by enterprises across retail, hospitality, corporate, and healthcare sectors.

name: Yodeck
tagline: Easy and affordable digital signage for any business
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage with free plan for one screen. Raspberry Pi powered with 200+ templates, remote management, and easy setup.
longDescription: Yodeck offers affordable cloud-based digital signage powered by Raspberry Pi. The platform includes 200+ free templates, a drag-and-drop editor, app integrations (YouTube, weather, social media), playlist scheduling, and remote device management. Free plan covers one screen, making it ideal for small businesses testing digital signage.

name: SpinetiX
shortDescription: End-to-end digital signage with hardware media players, cloud CMS, and content authoring software. 20 years of Swiss engineering innovation.
longDescription: SpinetiX is a Swiss digital signage pioneer celebrating 20 years of innovation. They deliver a complete end-to-end solution including HMP (Hyper Media Player) hardware, ARYA cloud CMS, and Elementi content authoring software. Known for reliability and security, SpinetiX players run an embedded OS with no moving parts.

name: Broadsign
shortDescription: Enterprise digital out-of-home (DOOH) platform for managing large-scale signage networks with programmatic advertising, campaign management, and analytics.
longDescription: Broadsign is the leading platform for digital out-of-home advertising, managing over 1.5 million signs worldwide. Features include programmatic ad buying via Broadsign Reach, campaign management with Broadsign Direct, content distribution, proof of play, and audience analytics. Primarily serves large DOOH networks, transit authorities, and media companies.

name: Four Winds Interactive (FWI)
tagline: Visual communications for the modern workplace
shortDescription: Enterprise visual communications platform for workplace signage, wayfinding, room scheduling, and employee engagement across corporate campuses.
longDescription: Four Winds Interactive (FWI) is an enterprise visual communications platform designed for corporate environments. Features include digital signage, interactive wayfinding, room and desk booking displays, corporate communications, and visitor management. Integrates with Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and workplace management systems.

name: Poppulo
tagline: The Harmony platform for workplace communications
shortDescription: Digital signage and employee communications platform with 4,500+ enterprise customers. Combines digital signage, email, mobile, and intranet channels.
longDescription: Poppulo (formerly Omnivex + Four Winds) provides the Harmony platform for omnichannel workplace communications. The platform unifies digital signage, email, mobile push, and intranet into a single communications hub. Features include content management, audience targeting, analytics, and integrations with HR systems. Serves 4,500+ enterprise customers globally.

name: CrownTV
shortDescription: All-in-one digital signage solution with proprietary media player, cloud dashboard, and 200+ apps. White-glove installation available nationwide.
longDescription: CrownTV provides a turnkey digital signage solution including proprietary media players, cloud-based content management dashboard, and 200+ content apps. Features include content scheduling, multi-location management, real-time updates, and 200+ integrations. Offers white-glove installation services across the United States.

name: Navori Labs
shortDescription: Swiss-made digital signage software with AI-powered content triggering, audience analytics, and computer vision for real-time content adaptation.
longDescription: Navori Labs delivers AI-powered digital signage software from Switzerland. Their QL platform features computer vision audience analytics, AI-driven content triggers (demographic, weather, time), automated content optimization, and multi-zone interactive layouts. AQUAJI analytics provides anonymous audience measurement for measuring engagement and ROI.

name: Kitcast
tagline: Digital signage for Apple TV and any screen
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage platform built for Apple TV with support for Android, Amazon Fire TV, and web players. Easy setup in minutes.
longDescription: Kitcast is a cloud-based digital signage platform with native Apple TV support. Features include drag-and-drop content editor, 40+ app integrations, playlist management, remote device monitoring, and multi-location management. Supports Apple TV, Android TV, Amazon Fire TV, and web-based players.

name: Planar
tagline: Extraordinary visual experiences for any environment
shortDescription: Premium commercial displays including direct-view LED, LCD video walls, touch screens, and transparent OLED. A Leyard company.
longDescription: Planar, a Leyard company, manufactures premium commercial display solutions for digital signage. Product line includes DirectLight LED video walls, Clarity Matrix LCD video walls, ultra-narrow bezel displays, touch screen displays, and transparent OLED panels. Known for high brightness, reliability, and 24/7 operation capability.

name: NEC Display Solutions
tagline: Professional display solutions for every application
shortDescription: Commercial displays, projectors, and LED solutions for digital signage. Part of Sharp NEC Display Solutions with global enterprise support.
longDescription: Sharp NEC Display Solutions offers a comprehensive range of commercial displays, projectors, and direct-view LED for digital signage applications. Features include 24/7 rated panels, built-in SoC computing, OPS slot for modularity, and NaViSet management software. Global enterprise support and extended warranties available.

name: Arreya
tagline: Cloud digital signage for Chrome and Android
shortDescription: Simple cloud-based digital signage for Chrome OS and Android devices. Real-time content updates, templates, and multi-screen management.
longDescription: Arreya is a cloud-based digital signage platform designed for Chrome OS and Android devices. Features include real-time content updates, HTML5 templates, multi-screen management, scheduling, and Google Workspace integration. Particularly popular in education and small business deployments.

name: Look Digital Signage
shortDescription: Cloud CMS for digital signage with support for Android, Chrome OS, Linux, and Windows. Data-driven content with real-time integrations.
longDescription: Look Digital Signage provides a cloud-based CMS for managing digital signage content across Android, Chrome OS, Linux, and Windows players. Features include data-driven content with real-time integrations, multi-zone layouts, scheduling, device monitoring, and proof-of-play reporting.

name: TouchSource
shortDescription: Turnkey digital directory and wayfinding solutions for commercial real estate, healthcare, and hospitality. Interactive kiosks with managed services.
longDescription: TouchSource specializes in digital building directories and wayfinding solutions. Products include lobby directories, interactive wayfinding kiosks, elevator displays, and event signage. Offers fully managed services including content updates, hardware monitoring, and on-site installation. Serves commercial real estate, healthcare, and hospitality markets.

name: Friendlyway
tagline: Digital signage and visitor management platform
shortDescription: Cloud-based platform combining digital signage, interactive kiosks, visitor management, and wayfinding for corporate and retail environments.
longDescription: Friendlyway provides a cloud-based platform that combines digital signage with visitor management and wayfinding. Features include interactive touch kiosks, digital reception, room booking displays, corporate communications, and analytics. Serves corporate campuses, retail, and public spaces.

name: Spectrio
shortDescription: Full-service digital signage and customer engagement company offering hardware, software, content creation, and managed services for multi-location businesses.
longDescription: Spectrio is a full-service customer engagement technology company offering digital signage, on-hold messaging, overhead music, Wi-Fi marketing, and scent marketing. Their digital signage solution includes hardware, cloud CMS, content creation services, and ongoing managed support. Serves multi-location franchises, healthcare, and hospitality.

name: Visix
tagline: Digital signage for campus and workplace
shortDescription: Digital signage solutions for higher education, corporate, and government campuses. Room signs, wayfinding, event boards, and emergency alerts.
longDescription: Visix provides digital signage solutions specifically designed for campus environments. Products include AxisTV Signage Suite CMS, EPS room signs, interactive wayfinding, event boards, and emergency alert integration with CAP/IPAWS. Serves higher education, corporate, government, and healthcare campuses.

name: REACH Media Network
shortDescription: Cloud digital signage with 150+ templates, data integrations, and white-label options. Strong presence in education, corporate, and healthcare.
longDescription: REACH Media Network provides cloud-based digital signage software with 150+ templates, data integrations (EHR, PMS, LMS), and white-label partnership options. Features include content scheduling, multi-screen management, interactive touch support, and emergency alert integration. Serves education, corporate, healthcare, and hospitality markets.

name: Daktronics
tagline: The world leader in LED video displays
shortDescription: Large-format LED display manufacturer for outdoor advertising, sports venues, and transportation. Custom display solutions with Venus content management.
longDescription: Daktronics is the world leader in large-format LED video displays, manufacturing systems for outdoor advertising billboards, sports venues, transportation hubs, and large-scale commercial installations. Venus content management software provides scheduling, content creation, and network management. Also offers indoor LED and LCD solutions.

name: Legrand AV (Chief/Da-Lite/Vaddio)
shortDescription: Professional AV mounting, enclosures, and infrastructure from Chief, Da-Lite, and Vaddio brands. Industry standard for digital signage installation hardware.
longDescription: Legrand AV brings together Chief (mounts and racks), Da-Lite (projection screens), and Vaddio (AV over IP) brands. Chief is the industry standard for digital signage mounting solutions including wall mounts, ceiling mounts, kiosk enclosures, video wall mounts, and outdoor enclosures. Essential infrastructure for any signage deployment.

name: Mood Media
shortDescription: In-store media solutions including digital signage, background music, scent marketing, and AV systems for retail and hospitality brands.
longDescription: Mood Media is a global leader in in-store media solutions, serving 500,000+ commercial locations worldwide. Services include digital signage content and management, background music (Mood:Media), scent marketing, AV design and installation, and on-hold messaging. Provides end-to-end managed services for multi-location retailers and hospitality brands.

name: Omnivex
shortDescription: Enterprise digital signage software for data-driven displays. Real-time data integration with business systems for dashboards, KPIs, and operational displays.
longDescription: Omnivex provides enterprise digital signage software specializing in real-time data visualization. The platform connects to databases, APIs, and business systems to display live KPIs, operational metrics, and dynamic content. Used in corporate, manufacturing, and transportation environments.

name: Wallboard
tagline: Digital signage for the modern workplace
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage for corporate communications. Microsoft 365 integration, KPI dashboards, and employee engagement displays.
longDescription: Wallboard is a cloud-based digital signage platform focused on corporate workplace communications. Deep integration with Microsoft 365 enables automatic display of SharePoint news, Teams messages, and Outlook calendars. Features include KPI dashboards, social media walls, and employee recognition displays.

name: OptiSigns
tagline: Affordable digital signage for any business
shortDescription: Budget-friendly cloud digital signage with 100+ templates and integrations. Supports Android, Fire TV, Raspberry Pi, Chrome OS, and Windows.
longDescription: OptiSigns offers affordable cloud-based digital signage software with support for a wide range of devices. Features include 100+ templates, app integrations, playlist scheduling, multi-screen management, and remote device monitoring. Popular with small businesses and franchises for menu boards and promotional displays.

name: Pickcel
shortDescription: Cloud digital signage with AI content recommendations, audience analytics, and 50+ app integrations. Enterprise features at competitive pricing.
longDescription: Pickcel is a cloud-based digital signage platform with AI-powered content recommendations and audience analytics. Features include drag-and-drop editor, 50+ app integrations, multi-zone layouts, scheduling, and proof-of-play reporting. Supports Android, Chrome OS, Windows, and Tizen players.

name: Mandoe Media
shortDescription: AI-powered digital signage platform that auto-generates content. Smart templates, scheduling, and multi-location management for businesses of all sizes.
longDescription: Mandoe Media uses AI to simplify digital signage content creation. The platform automatically generates professional designs based on your business type and goals. Features include smart templates, AI content suggestions, scheduling, multi-location management, and analytics.

name: TelemetryTV
tagline: Digital signage for the data-driven enterprise
shortDescription: Enterprise digital signage CMS with live data dashboards, web app embedding, and developer-friendly API. Popular with tech companies and operations centers.
longDescription: TelemetryTV is an enterprise digital signage platform designed for data-driven environments. Features include web app embedding, live dashboard integration (Power BI, Grafana, Google Data Studio), API access, device management, and multi-zone layouts. Popular with technology companies, operations centers, and corporate offices.

name: Fugo
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage with Canva integration, social media walls, and team collaboration. Quick setup on any screen with a browser.
longDescription: Fugo is a cloud-based digital signage platform emphasizing simplicity and team collaboration. Key features include native Canva integration for design, social media walls, Google Workspace integration, multi-user collaboration, and a web-based player that runs on any device with a browser.

name: Spectrio Digital Menu Boards
shortDescription: Turnkey digital menu board solutions for QSR and restaurants. Includes hardware, software, content design, and installation services.
longDescription: Spectrio's Digital Menu Board division provides turnkey solutions specifically for restaurants and QSR. Services include commercial display hardware, menu board CMS, professional menu content design, dayparting automation, and nationwide installation. Integrates with POS systems for real-time pricing updates.

name: ViewSonic
tagline: Visual solutions for the digital workplace
shortDescription: Commercial displays, interactive flat panels, and presentation displays for digital signage. myViewBoard software for collaborative content management.
longDescription: ViewSonic manufactures commercial displays for digital signage including standard signage panels, interactive flat panels, and all-in-one display solutions. myViewBoard software provides cloud-based content management and wireless presentation. Strong presence in education with interactive whiteboards and corporate with presentation displays.

name: Sony Professional Displays
tagline: Professional BRAVIA displays for digital signage
shortDescription: BRAVIA professional displays with 4K HDR, built-in Android SoC, and Pro Bravia management. Premium image quality for high-end retail and corporate.
longDescription: Sony's Professional Display division offers BRAVIA signage displays with 4K HDR image quality, built-in Android SoC for CMS apps, and Pro Bravia software for remote management. Crystal LED (CLED) provides seamless video walls for premium installations. Known for exceptional color accuracy and image processing.

name: Philips Professional Display Solutions
tagline: Professional displays powered by Android SoC
shortDescription: Commercial displays with built-in Android SoC platform. D-Line, Q-Line, and T-Line ranges covering signage, interactive, and outdoor applications.
longDescription: Philips Professional Display Solutions (PPDS) offers commercial displays powered by a built-in Android SoC platform. Product ranges include D-Line (standard signage), Q-Line (interactive), T-Line (large format), B-Line (professional TV), and outdoor displays. The Android SoC supports direct CMS app installation without external players.

name: Panasonic Connect
shortDescription: Professional displays, projectors, and LED solutions for digital signage. Laser projectors and LinkRay light-based communication technology.
longDescription: Panasonic Connect provides professional display and projection solutions for digital signage. Products include commercial displays, laser projectors for large-venue signage, and LED video walls. LinkRay technology uses LED light signals to deliver content to smartphones near displays.

name: BenQ Business Display
tagline: Smart signage for every business need
shortDescription: Commercial displays with built-in Android and cloud management. Smart Signage series for retail, QSR, and corporate applications.
longDescription: BenQ offers Smart Signage commercial displays with built-in Android SoC and X-Sign cloud management software. Product lines include ST series (4K standard), SL series (interactive), and IL series (EDLA-certified for Google). X-Sign provides content creation, scheduling, and remote management.

name: iiyama ProLite
shortDescription: Cost-effective commercial displays for digital signage. Wide range from 24 to 98 inches with 24/7 operation and embedded Android player options.
longDescription: iiyama offers cost-effective commercial displays for digital signage applications. The ProLite range includes standard signage, touch screens, outdoor-rated displays, and large-format options up to 98 inches. Many models include embedded Android players for CMS apps. Known for value pricing in the European and Asian markets.

name: Peerless-AV
tagline: Mounting and AV solutions for any environment
shortDescription: Professional mounting solutions for digital signage including kiosk enclosures, outdoor housings, video wall mounts, and ceiling mounts.
longDescription: Peerless-AV manufactures professional mounting and AV integration products for digital signage. Products include outdoor display enclosures (UV2 series), indoor/outdoor kiosks, video wall mounting systems, ceiling mounts, cart/stand solutions, and cable management. Also offers tabletop kiosks and self-service enclosures.

name: Elo Touch Solutions
shortDescription: Interactive touchscreen displays and kiosk solutions for retail POS, wayfinding, and self-service applications. EloView cloud management platform.
longDescription: Elo Touch Solutions manufactures commercial touchscreen displays, interactive kiosks, and point-of-sale systems. Products include open-frame touch monitors, all-in-one touch computers, and modular kiosk platforms. EloView cloud management provides remote device monitoring, content management, and OTA updates.

name: SiliconCore Technology
shortDescription: Fine-pitch LED video wall displays for premium indoor installations. Patented COB (Chip-on-Board) technology for superior reliability and image quality.
longDescription: SiliconCore specializes in ultra-fine pitch LED display technology using patented Chip-on-Board (COB) manufacturing. Products include Lisa (narrow pixel pitch), LISA Slim, and Z3 Pro displays for indoor applications. Known for superior reliability, viewing angles, and image quality in corporate lobbies, control rooms, and broadcast studios.

name: Absen LED
shortDescription: Large-format LED displays for indoor and outdoor digital signage. Wide product range from fixed installations to rental and staging.
longDescription: Absen is one of the world's largest LED display manufacturers, serving digital signage, events, and architectural markets. Product lines include Acclaim (fine pitch indoor), Absenicon (all-in-one LED), and outdoor LED displays. Known for value pricing and global distribution network.

name: Leyard
shortDescription: LED video wall manufacturer and parent company of Planar. Fine-pitch LED, outdoor LED, and creative LED display solutions for signage.
longDescription: Leyard is a global LED display manufacturer and parent company of Planar. Products include fine-pitch LED for indoor signage, outdoor LED for advertising, creative LED for architectural installations, and transparent LED for retail. Operates globally with manufacturing in China and distribution through Planar in North America.

name: Crestron
tagline: Technology that works for your enterprise
shortDescription: Enterprise AV control and room scheduling displays. DM NVX for AV-over-IP distribution, XiO Cloud for remote management across campuses.
longDescription: Crestron provides enterprise AV control systems, room scheduling panels, and AV-over-IP distribution for digital signage networks. Products include room scheduling touch panels, DM NVX AV-over-IP for content distribution, XiO Cloud for remote management, and control processors for complex multi-display environments.

name: Enplug
tagline: Digital signage for the connected workplace
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage for corporate offices with live social feeds, news tickers, dashboards, and emergency alerts.
longDescription: Enplug provides cloud-based digital signage for modern workplaces. Features include live social media feeds, news tickers, custom dashboards, emergency alert overrides, and multi-location management. Supports BrightSign, Chrome OS, and Android players.

name: Skykit
shortDescription: Cloud digital signage with workplace management tools including room booking, desk reservation, and employee communications.
longDescription: Skykit offers cloud-based digital signage combined with workplace management tools. Products include Beam (digital signage CMS), Control (device management), and workplace solutions for room booking and desk reservation. Supports Chrome OS, Android, and BrightSign players.

name: Tightrope Media Systems
shortDescription: Enterprise digital signage and IPTV platform for live TV distribution combined with signage content on the same screens.
longDescription: Tightrope Media Systems provides the Carousel digital signage and Cablecast IPTV platform. Carousel combines signage content with live TV distribution on the same screens. Used by hospitals, universities, and corporate campuses that need to mix broadcast TV with digital signage content.

name: Intuiface
shortDescription: No-code platform for creating interactive digital signage, kiosks, and touch experiences. Drag-and-drop experience builder with analytics.
longDescription: Intuiface is a no-code platform for creating interactive digital experiences including touch kiosks, interactive signage, product configurators, and immersive installations. The drag-and-drop Composer tool lets designers build multi-touch experiences without programming. Analytics dashboard tracks user interactions and engagement.

name: Broadsign Reach
shortDescription: Programmatic buying platform connecting advertisers with digital out-of-home screen networks. Automated campaign delivery and audience targeting.
longDescription: Broadsign Reach is the supply-side platform (SSP) connecting digital out-of-home networks with programmatic demand. Enables screen network operators to monetize their displays through automated, real-time ad buying from DSPs like The Trade Desk, DV360, and Vistar Media.

name: Vistar Media
shortDescription: DSP and SSP for programmatic digital out-of-home advertising. Audience targeting, campaign management, and attribution for DOOH networks.
longDescription: Vistar Media operates the leading programmatic marketplace for digital out-of-home advertising. The platform serves both demand side (advertisers buying DOOH inventory) and supply side (network operators selling screen time). Features include audience targeting, location data, campaign optimization, and attribution measurement.

name: Airtame
tagline: Wireless screen sharing and digital signage
shortDescription: Wireless screen sharing device with built-in digital signage. Combines presentation casting with digital signage content when screens are idle.
longDescription: Airtame is a wireless screen sharing device that doubles as a digital signage player. When no one is presenting, screens automatically display signage content (dashboards, announcements, social feeds). Cloud management enables remote content updates and device monitoring across locations.

name: Mersive Solstice
shortDescription: Enterprise wireless presentation platform with digital signage mode. Solstice pods enable content sharing and display signage when rooms are unoccupied.
longDescription: Mersive Solstice provides enterprise wireless collaboration for meeting rooms with built-in digital signage capabilities. Solstice pods enable wireless screen sharing from any device, and automatically display signage content between meetings. Kepler management dashboard provides analytics and remote administration.

name: Userful
tagline: Visual networking platform for video walls
shortDescription: Software-defined AV platform for driving video walls and multi-display signage from a single server. AV-over-IP for enterprise deployments.
longDescription: Userful provides a software-defined visual networking platform that drives video walls and multi-display signage from centralized servers over standard network infrastructure. Replaces traditional AV hardware with software, reducing cost and complexity for large-scale video wall and multi-screen deployments.

name: Datapath
tagline: Video wall controllers and capture technology
shortDescription: Video wall processor hardware for driving multi-screen signage installations. Supports complex layouts, multiple inputs, and real-time content.
longDescription: Datapath manufactures video wall controllers, capture cards, and AV-over-IP solutions. VSN series video wall controllers drive complex multi-screen layouts from multiple input sources. Used in control rooms, corporate lobbies, and broadcast environments where precise multi-display management is required.

name: Matrox
shortDescription: Multi-display graphics cards and video wall controllers for digital signage. Drive up to 16 screens from a single card.
longDescription: Matrox manufactures multi-display graphics cards and video wall controller boards for digital signage. Products include D-series multi-display cards (up to 4 outputs per card), QuadHead2Go multi-monitor controllers, and Mura IPX networked video wall processors. Essential hardware for PC-based multi-screen signage.

name: 22Miles
shortDescription: Enterprise digital signage with 3D wayfinding, interactive directories, and visitor management. Used in healthcare, airports, and corporate campuses.
longDescription: 22Miles provides enterprise digital signage with advanced 3D wayfinding and interactive directory features. The platform supports touchscreen kiosks, mobile wayfinding, digital directories, room booking, and visitor check-in. Popular in healthcare facilities, airports, convention centers, and corporate campuses.

name: Convergent
shortDescription: AV integration firm specializing in large-scale digital signage, video walls, and immersive experiences for corporate and entertainment venues.
longDescription: Convergent is a national AV integration firm specializing in complex digital signage installations. Services include video wall design and installation, immersive experiences, corporate broadcast studios, command centers, and experience centers. Handles full project lifecycle from design through installation and ongoing support.

name: AVI-SPL
shortDescription: Largest AV integrator in the world. Digital signage design, installation, and managed services for Fortune 500 companies and global enterprises.
longDescription: AVI-SPL is the world's largest AV integrator, providing digital workplace technology services including digital signage design, installation, and managed services. Services span video walls, room systems, enterprise communication displays, and managed AV services. Serves Fortune 500 companies with offices across the globe.

name: Diversified
shortDescription: Global AV and technology integrator for enterprise digital signage, broadcast, and immersive experiences. Design, build, and managed services.
longDescription: Diversified is a global technology solutions company providing AV integration, managed services, and technology consulting. Digital signage services include experience center design, corporate communication networks, retail digital displays, and broadcast studios. Offers full lifecycle support from design through managed operations.

name: Whitlock (now AVI-SPL)
shortDescription: AV managed services provider now part of AVI-SPL. Specializes in enterprise AV support, digital signage management, and remote monitoring.
longDescription: Whitlock, now integrated into AVI-SPL, provides AV managed services including remote monitoring, help desk support, on-site technicians, and proactive maintenance for digital signage networks. Known for enterprise-grade SLAs and global service delivery.

name: SITO Mobile (now Cognitiv)
shortDescription: AI-powered programmatic advertising platform for digital out-of-home. Audience targeting using deep learning for optimized campaign delivery.
longDescription: Cognitiv (formerly SITO Mobile) provides AI-powered programmatic advertising for digital out-of-home networks. Deep learning algorithms optimize ad placement, audience targeting, and campaign performance across DOOH screens. Integrates with major DSPs and SSPs for automated buying.

name: MediaTile
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage CMS for managing content across Android, Windows, and Samsung Tizen players. Simple pricing with unlimited content.
longDescription: MediaTile provides cloud-based digital signage management software supporting Android, Windows, Samsung Tizen, and LG webOS players. Features include content scheduling, multi-zone layouts, proof-of-play, and REST API for custom integrations. Simple per-player pricing with unlimited content storage.

name: Screenly
tagline: Digital signage for Raspberry Pi and enterprise
shortDescription: Digital signage platform for Raspberry Pi with enterprise features. Edge computing, secure boot, and fleet management for large deployments.
longDescription: Screenly provides digital signage software optimized for Raspberry Pi hardware. Enterprise features include secure boot, fleet management, edge computing, and OTA updates. The platform handles thousands of screens with centralized management. Open source edition (Anthias) available for single screens.

name: PiSignage
shortDescription: Lightweight digital signage software designed for Raspberry Pi. Free for up to 2 players with cloud management dashboard.
longDescription: PiSignage is a lightweight digital signage solution designed specifically for Raspberry Pi hardware. Features include playlist management, group management, scheduled content, and a cloud dashboard for remote monitoring. Free tier covers up to 2 players, making it ideal for small deployments and prototyping.

name: Acquire Digital
shortDescription: Interactive self-service kiosks and digital signage for retail, hospitality, and healthcare. Custom kiosk design and deployment services.
longDescription: Acquire Digital provides interactive self-service kiosks and digital signage solutions. Products include wayfinding kiosks, self-order kiosks, check-in stations, and digital directories. Offers custom kiosk hardware design, software development, and nationwide deployment services.

name: STRATACACHE
tagline: Marketing technology and digital signage solutions
shortDescription: Parent company of Scala and other digital signage brands. Enterprise solutions for retail media, customer engagement, and intelligent display networks.
longDescription: STRATACACHE is a marketing technology holding company that owns Scala (digital signage), Walkbase (in-store analytics), X2O Media (enterprise video), and other brands. Provides end-to-end solutions for retail media networks, customer engagement, and intelligent digital signage at enterprise scale.

name: X2O Media
tagline: Enterprise video and digital signage platform
shortDescription: Enterprise platform for video communication, digital signage, and IPTV. Part of STRATACACHE. Used in corporate, healthcare, and government.
longDescription: X2O Media provides an enterprise platform combining video communication, digital signage, and IPTV distribution. Features include live video encoding, on-demand video, signage content management, and multi-channel distribution. A STRATACACHE company serving corporate, healthcare, and government clients.

name: Reflect Systems
tagline: Enterprise digital signage and media networks
shortDescription: Enterprise digital signage for retail media networks and corporate communications. Content management with programmatic ad integration.
longDescription: Reflect Systems provides enterprise digital signage software for retail media networks, in-store merchandising, and corporate communications. Features include content management, ad insertion, programmatic integration, analytics, and multi-location network management.

name: Korbyt (formerly Appspace)
shortDescription: Workplace experience platform combining digital signage, space management, and employee communications in a unified dashboard.
longDescription: Korbyt (formerly Appspace) provides a workplace experience management platform that unifies digital signage, room booking, desk reservation, visitor management, and employee communications. Integrates with Microsoft Teams, Zoom, and workplace management systems. Serves enterprise customers across corporate, education, and healthcare.

name: Appspace
shortDescription: Enterprise workplace communications platform with digital signage, space reservation, and employee engagement. Integrates with Microsoft and Google ecosystems.
longDescription: Appspace provides an enterprise platform for workplace communications combining digital signage, space management (room and desk booking), employee engagement, and visitor management. Native integration with Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Zoom, and major HR platforms. Used by enterprises worldwide.

name: Ping HD
shortDescription: Digital signage and interactive kiosk solutions with custom content development. Full-service from strategy through deployment and managed support.
longDescription: Ping HD provides connected digital experiences including digital signage, interactive kiosks, mobile apps, and custom content development. Services span strategy consulting, hardware procurement, content creation, installation, and ongoing managed support for multi-location deployments.

name: Signagelive
tagline: Apps and integrations for Signagelive CMS
shortDescription: Marketplace of apps and widgets for the Signagelive digital signage platform. Weather, social media, data visualization, and third-party integrations.
longDescription: Signagelive Marketplace provides apps and widgets that extend the Signagelive CMS platform. Available integrations include weather displays, social media walls, RSS feeds, Power BI dashboards, Google analytics, countdown timers, and custom HTML5 widgets. Enables data-driven content without development.

name: SmarterSign
tagline: Cloud digital signage for Chrome devices
shortDescription: Chrome OS digital signage with Google Admin integration. Simple cloud management for Chromebit, Chromebox, and Chrome OS devices.
longDescription: SmarterSign is a Chrome OS-focused digital signage solution that integrates with Google Admin Console for device management. Features include content scheduling, templates, multi-screen management, and automatic Chrome OS kiosk mode configuration. Ideal for organizations already using Google Workspace.

name: Four Winds Interactive (Poppulo Harmony)
shortDescription: Enterprise visual communications platform rebranded as part of Poppulo Harmony. Workplace signage, wayfinding, and employee engagement.
longDescription: Four Winds Interactive is now part of Poppulo, providing the visual communications component of the Poppulo Harmony platform. Features include digital signage content management, interactive wayfinding, room booking displays, and corporate communications. Enterprise features include SSO, RBAC, and Microsoft 365 integration.

name: Creative Realities
shortDescription: Full-service digital signage and experiential technology company. Design, development, and managed services for branded environments.
longDescription: Creative Realities (CRI) provides technology-driven branded experiences including digital signage networks, interactive installations, and immersive environments. Services include strategic consulting, creative design, technology development, installation, and ongoing managed operations. Publicly traded (CREX).

name: Hughes Digital Signage
tagline: Managed digital signage for multi-location enterprises
shortDescription: Fully managed digital signage service for multi-location businesses. Hardware, software, content, and NOC monitoring included.
longDescription: Hughes provides fully managed digital signage services for multi-location enterprises. The managed service includes hardware procurement, CMS software, content creation, satellite/cellular/broadband connectivity, 24/7 NOC monitoring, and field service support. Serves retail chains, restaurants, and financial institutions.

name: Cineplex Digital Media
shortDescription: Digital signage content management and media sales for retail, entertainment, and transit. Part of Cineplex Entertainment.
longDescription: Cineplex Digital Media, a division of Cineplex Entertainment, provides digital signage content management and advertising solutions. Services include content creation, network management, and advertising sales for digital out-of-home networks. Manages signage in entertainment venues, retail locations, and transit systems across Canada.

name: Dise
shortDescription: Enterprise digital signage CMS with data integration, HTML5 content, and scalable architecture. Swedish-developed platform.
longDescription: Dise provides enterprise digital signage software with strong data integration capabilities. Features include HTML5 content rendering, real-time data feeds, multi-zone layouts, scheduling, and scalable server architecture. Originally developed in Sweden, used across European and North American enterprise deployments.

name: Sedao
tagline: Digital signage solutions UK and Europe
shortDescription: UK-based digital signage provider with hardware, software, and installation services. MediaStar IPTV and signage distribution platform.
longDescription: Sedao is a UK-based digital signage solutions provider offering hardware, software, and installation services. Their MediaStar platform provides IPTV and signage content distribution over IP networks. Services include design consultation, hardware supply, installation, and ongoing support across the UK and Europe.

name: NovaStar
shortDescription: LED display controllers, video processors, and cloud management for LED signage. Industry-leading control systems for LED video walls.
longDescription: NovaStar manufactures LED display control systems including sending cards, receiving cards, video processors, and cloud monitoring platforms. VNNOX cloud platform provides remote LED display management, content scheduling, and real-time monitoring. Essential backend technology for most LED signage installations worldwide.

name: Colorlight
shortDescription: LED display controllers and video processors for driving large-format LED signage installations. Cloud management for LED networks.
longDescription: Colorlight provides LED display control technology including sending cards, receiving cards, video processors, and cloud management software. Products support pixel pitch from 0.9mm to 40mm+, covering indoor fine-pitch through large outdoor LED applications. Global distribution network serving LED manufacturers and integrators.

name: Prismview (Samsung)
shortDescription: LED billboard and large-format outdoor display manufacturer, a Samsung company. Serves outdoor advertising, sports, and transit markets.
longDescription: Prismview, a Samsung Electronics company, manufactures large-format LED displays for outdoor advertising billboards, sports venue scoreboards, and transit signage. Products include roadside billboards, spectacular displays, and custom-shaped LED installations. SmartLink platform provides remote monitoring and content management.

name: Watchfire Signs
tagline: LED signs for businesses and communities
shortDescription: Outdoor LED sign manufacturer for business signage, community message centers, and digital billboards. US-manufactured with Ignite CMS.
longDescription: Watchfire manufactures outdoor LED signs for businesses, municipalities, schools, and churches. Products include full-color LED message centers, digital billboards, and gas price signs. US-manufactured in Danville, Illinois. Ignite CMS provides content creation, scheduling, and remote management. Over 75,000 installations nationwide.

name: SNA Displays
shortDescription: Custom large-format LED display solutions for iconic installations. Times Square displays, building wraps, and architectural LED.
longDescription: SNA Displays designs and manufactures custom LED display solutions for spectacular installations. Projects include Times Square displays, building-scale media facades, stadium displays, and architectural LED. Offers complete project management from design through installation and content management.

name: DigitalBridge
shortDescription: Content creation agency specializing in digital signage. Motion graphics, video production, and interactive content for retail and corporate displays.
longDescription: DigitalBridge creates professional content for digital signage networks including motion graphics, video production, interactive experiences, and data-driven templates. Services span concept development, design, animation, and ongoing content management for retail, corporate, and hospitality clients.

name: CastHub
tagline: Stream and display live content on signage
shortDescription: Digital signage platform focused on live streaming content. Social media walls, live TV, sports scores, and real-time data feeds on any screen.
longDescription: CastHub specializes in displaying live, real-time content on digital signage screens. Features include social media walls, live TV streaming, sports scores, RSS feeds, countdown timers, and custom web content. Browser-based player runs on any device with a modern web browser.

name: Kiosk Group
shortDescription: iPad and tablet kiosk enclosures for digital signage, self-service, and point-of-sale. Secure housings with payment terminal integration.
longDescription: Kiosk Group manufactures tablet and iPad kiosk enclosures for digital signage, self-service, POS, and information displays. Products include floor-standing kiosks, wall-mount enclosures, countertop stands, and outdoor-rated housings. Supports iPad, Samsung tablets, and custom tablets with secure locking and power management.

name: Armodilo
tagline: Premium tablet and iPad kiosk enclosures
shortDescription: Design-forward tablet kiosk enclosures and digital signage stands. Award-winning industrial design for iPad and tablet-based signage deployments.
longDescription: Armodilo designs and manufactures premium tablet kiosk enclosures and display stands with award-winning industrial design. Products include floor stands, wall mounts, desk stands, and custom enclosures for iPad, Samsung, and other tablets. Used in retail, hospitality, healthcare, and corporate environments.

name: Mimo Monitors
shortDescription: Small-format commercial displays (7-21 inches) for POS, wayfinding, and secondary signage. USB-powered and HDMI options.
longDescription: Mimo Monitors manufactures small-format commercial displays ranging from 7 to 21 inches. Products include USB-powered touch monitors, HDMI displays, open-frame panels, and tablet-like displays. Popular for POS secondary screens, room signs, shelf-edge displays, and compact signage applications.

name: DisplayIt!
shortDescription: Windows-based digital signage CMS with multi-zone layouts, data integration, and scheduling. Designed for Windows PC-based media players.
longDescription: DisplayIt! provides Windows-based digital signage content management software. Features include multi-zone layout editor, scheduling, data integration (RSS, XML, SQL), ticker overlays, and network management. Designed for deployment on Windows PCs and supports remote content updates.

name: UCView
shortDescription: Digital signage and IPTV platform for healthcare, hospitality, and enterprise. Combines signage content with live TV distribution.
longDescription: UCView provides digital signage and IPTV solutions that combine traditional signage content with live television distribution. Features include content management, IPTV encoding and distribution, interactive touch, and emergency alert integration. Serves healthcare, hospitality, and corporate markets.

name: Xibo
shortDescription: Leading open source digital signage CMS. Docker-based server with players for Windows, Linux, Android, and Tizen. Free self-hosted or paid cloud option.
longDescription: Xibo is the most popular open source digital signage CMS, used by thousands of organizations worldwide. Features include drag-and-drop layout designer, scheduling, DataSet integration, interactive actions, and multi-platform player support. Available as free self-hosted (Docker) or paid Xibo Cloud hosting.

name: Concerto
tagline: Open source digital signage for campuses
shortDescription: Open source digital signage designed for campus environments. Multi-user content submission with approval workflows. Developed at RPI.
longDescription: Concerto is an open source digital signage system developed at Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute (RPI). Designed for campus environments where multiple departments submit content for approval and display. Features include content moderation workflows, plugin architecture, and web-based management.

name: RevelDigital
tagline: Cloud digital signage for Chrome and Android
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage CMS with free tier. Supports Chrome OS, Android, BrightSign, and Raspberry Pi players.
longDescription: RevelDigital provides cloud-based digital signage software with a free single-player tier. Features include template editor, scheduling, multi-zone layouts, real-time data feeds, and device monitoring. Supports Chrome OS, Android, BrightSign, and Raspberry Pi players.

name: Digital Signage Today
tagline: Digital signage industry news and resources
shortDescription: Leading industry news publication covering digital signage technology, trends, and vendor news. Includes a basic vendor directory and buyer's guide.
longDescription: Digital Signage Today is the leading online publication for the digital signage industry. Provides news, analysis, vendor profiles, buyer's guides, and industry research. Hosts webinars and produces research reports on market trends, technology, and best practices.

name: Sixteen:Nine
tagline: Digital signage and DOOH industry commentary
shortDescription: Independent digital signage industry blog and podcast. Expert commentary on technology, trends, and vendors by Dave Haynes.
longDescription: Sixteen:Nine is an independent digital signage industry blog and podcast hosted by Dave Haynes, a veteran industry analyst. Provides expert commentary, vendor analysis, technology reviews, and trend analysis. The most-read independent voice in the digital signage industry.

name: DSF (Digital Signage Federation)
shortDescription: Trade organization for the digital signage industry. Provides networking, education, standards development, and advocacy for the industry.
longDescription: The Digital Signage Federation (DSF) is the non-profit trade organization representing the digital signage industry. Provides industry networking events, educational programs, best practice standards, and government advocacy. Membership includes vendors, integrators, and end users.

name: Liqvid
shortDescription: Strategy consulting firm specializing in retail digital signage, in-store media, and customer experience technology deployments.
longDescription: Liqvid provides strategy consulting for retail digital signage and in-store media deployments. Services include needs assessment, vendor selection, ROI analysis, project management, and deployment oversight. Helps retailers navigate the complex vendor landscape and build effective digital signage strategies.

name: Dot2Dot Communications
shortDescription: Content creation agency for digital signage. Motion graphics, video, interactive content, and ongoing content management services.
longDescription: Dot2Dot Communications is a content creation agency specializing in digital signage. Services include motion graphics design, video production, interactive content development, and ongoing content management. Works with retail, corporate, hospitality, and healthcare clients to produce engaging screen content.

name: Livewire Digital
tagline: Digital signage content and technology services
shortDescription: Full-service digital signage company offering content creation, technology consulting, and managed services for multi-location brands.
longDescription: Livewire Digital provides full-service digital signage solutions including content creation, technology consulting, hardware procurement, and managed network services. Specializes in multi-location retail and hospitality brands requiring consistent, on-brand digital experiences across hundreds of locations.

name: Outform
shortDescription: Interactive retail technology company creating connected in-store experiences. Touch displays, lift-and-learn, and smart retail fixtures.
longDescription: Outform creates connected retail experiences using interactive technology including touchscreen displays, lift-and-learn smart fixtures, augmented reality, and digital endcaps. Works with major retail brands to design, build, and deploy interactive in-store technology that drives engagement and sales.

name: Perch Interactive
shortDescription: Interactive retail display technology using lift-and-learn sensors. Screens activate when products are picked up, showing videos and information.
longDescription: Perch Interactive provides lift-and-learn retail display technology. Sensors detect when shoppers pick up products, triggering relevant video content, product comparisons, and promotional information on adjacent screens. Analytics track which products are picked up most frequently, informing merchandising decisions.

name: Ombori Grid
shortDescription: Cloud platform for interactive in-store experiences. Queue management, wayfinding, mobile ordering, and digital signage for retail and hospitality.
longDescription: Ombori Grid provides a cloud platform for phygital (physical + digital) customer engagement. Solutions include queue management displays, interactive wayfinding, mobile ordering, digital signage, and in-store analytics. Built on Microsoft Azure with native Teams and Power BI integration.

name: Grassfish
tagline: Digital signage and in-store experience platform
shortDescription: European digital signage platform for retail and banking. Content management, lift-and-learn, analytics, and sensor-triggered content.
longDescription: Grassfish is a European digital signage platform specializing in retail and banking environments. Features include content management, interactive lift-and-learn technology, audience analytics, sensor-triggered content, and ESL (electronic shelf label) integration. Headquartered in Austria, serving European and global markets.

name: Dynasign
shortDescription: Enterprise digital signage software with built-in interactivity, data integration, and multi-screen management. 20+ years in the industry.
longDescription: Dynasign provides enterprise digital signage software with over 20 years of industry experience. Features include interactive touch support, real-time data integration, multi-zone layouts, scheduling, and centralized management for multi-site deployments. Supports Windows and Android players.

name: QL by Navori
shortDescription: Navori Labs flagship digital signage CMS. AI-powered content triggering, computer vision analytics, and enterprise-grade content management.
longDescription: QL is Navori Labs' flagship digital signage CMS platform. Features include AI-powered content automation, audience-triggered content via AQUAJI computer vision, multi-zone scheduling, interactive touch, HTML5 rendering, and enterprise API. Deployed across retail, corporate, and transit environments globally.

name: Samsung MagicINFO
shortDescription: Samsung's native CMS for Tizen SoC displays. Content management, scheduling, device monitoring, and remote firmware updates for Samsung commercial displays.
longDescription: MagicINFO is Samsung's native content management system for their commercial display lineup. Available as cloud (MagicINFO Cloud) or on-premise (MagicINFO Server). Features include content authoring, scheduling, device management, remote firmware updates, and real-time monitoring. Free basic tier included with Samsung commercial displays.

name: LG SuperSign
shortDescription: LG's native CMS for webOS commercial displays. Content creation, scheduling, and remote management for up to 1,000 LG screens.
longDescription: LG SuperSign is LG's native digital signage content management system for webOS commercial displays. SuperSign CMS enables content creation, scheduling, and remote management for networks up to 1,000 displays. SuperSign Editor provides drag-and-drop content design. Free with LG commercial display purchases.

name: Philips CMND
shortDescription: Philips native CMS and device management for PPDS Android SoC displays. Content scheduling, remote management, and display control.
longDescription: CMND is Philips Professional Display Solutions' native platform for managing Android SoC commercial displays. Includes CMND & Create (content authoring), CMND & Deploy (content distribution), and CMND & Control (device management). Free with Philips commercial display purchases.

name: Brightsign BSN.cloud
shortDescription: Cloud management for BrightSign media players. Device provisioning, content management, health monitoring, and OTA firmware updates.
longDescription: BSN.cloud is BrightSign's cloud management platform for their media player hardware. Features include device provisioning, content management, health monitoring, OTA firmware updates, and fleet management. Basic device management is free; advanced features require a subscription.

name: Embed Signage
tagline: Cloud digital signage for any device
shortDescription: Cloud-based digital signage supporting Samsung Tizen, LG webOS, BrightSign, Android, Chrome OS, and Windows. HTML5 content with drag-and-drop editor.
longDescription: embed signage is a cloud-based digital signage CMS supporting a wide range of devices including Samsung Tizen, LG webOS, BrightSign, Android, Chrome OS, and Windows. Features include HTML5 drag-and-drop editor, scheduling, multi-zone layouts, and device monitoring. Known for broad platform support.

name: Nento
shortDescription: Digital menu board platform designed for restaurants and QSR. POS integration, dayparting, allergen info, and nutritional data display.
longDescription: Nento provides digital menu board solutions designed specifically for restaurants and QSR. Features include POS system integration for real-time pricing, automatic dayparting, allergen and nutritional information display, multi-location management, and mobile ordering integration.

name: MenuPad
shortDescription: Interactive digital menus and ordering systems for restaurants, bars, and hotels. Tablet-based tableside ordering with CMS backend.
longDescription: MenuPad provides interactive digital menu solutions for restaurants, bars, and hotels. Products include tablet-based tableside menus with ordering capabilities, wall-mounted digital menu displays, and a CMS backend for menu management. Supports multiple languages, allergen filtering, and POS integration.

name: Raydiant
shortDescription: In-location experience platform for digital signage, music, and customer engagement. Plug-and-play hardware with cloud management.
longDescription: Raydiant provides an in-location experience platform combining digital signage, background music, and customer engagement tools. Plug-and-play hardware with cloud-based management, content marketplace, and analytics. Used by franchise restaurants, retail stores, and service businesses.

name: Enqueue
shortDescription: Queue management and digital signage for service environments. Ticket dispensing, queue displays, and appointment scheduling for banks and government offices.
longDescription: Enqueue provides queue management systems with integrated digital signage for service environments. Features include ticket dispensing kiosks, queue status displays, appointment scheduling, customer flow analytics, and digital signage content between queue updates. Serves banks, government offices, and healthcare facilities.

name: Wavetec
shortDescription: Queue management, digital signage, and customer feedback systems. Complete customer journey management for banks, telecom, and government.
longDescription: Wavetec provides customer experience management solutions combining queue management, digital signage, self-service kiosks, and customer feedback systems. Deployed in 80+ countries serving banks, telecom operators, government agencies, and healthcare facilities.

name: Chief (Legrand AV)
shortDescription: Professional mounting solutions for commercial displays. Wall mounts, ceiling mounts, video wall mounts, and outdoor enclosures. Part of Legrand AV.
longDescription: Chief, a Legrand AV brand, manufactures professional mounting hardware for commercial displays. Products include Fusion wall mounts, ceiling mounts for suspended displays, KONTOUR video wall mounting systems, and Impact outdoor enclosures. The industry standard for commercial display installation hardware.

name: Crimson AV
shortDescription: Cost-effective commercial display mounts including wall mounts, ceiling mounts, floor stands, and video wall frames. US-manufactured.
longDescription: Crimson AV manufactures cost-effective commercial display mounting solutions. Products include wall mounts, ceiling mounts, floor stands, kiosk enclosures, and video wall frames. All products US-manufactured with competitive pricing. Lifetime warranty on most products.

name: Premier Mounts
shortDescription: Professional mounting solutions for digital signage including wall mounts, mobile carts, ceiling mounts, and custom mounting systems.
longDescription: Premier Mounts provides professional mounting solutions for digital signage and AV installations. Products include wall mounts, mobile carts, ceiling mounts, outdoor enclosures, and custom mounting systems. Known for innovative designs like the LMVP (Low-Profile Menu Board Mount) for QSR applications.

name: Saturn Visual Solutions
shortDescription: UK-based digital signage hardware supplier. Freestanding kiosks, outdoor displays, touch screens, and video walls with installation services.
longDescription: Saturn Visual Solutions is a UK-based digital signage hardware supplier offering freestanding digital posters, outdoor displays, touch screen kiosks, video walls, and window displays. Provides installation services across the UK and Europe. Known for competitive pricing and quick delivery.

name: Advantech
shortDescription: Industrial computing and IoT hardware for digital signage. Fanless media players, edge computing devices, and panel PCs for signage applications.
longDescription: Advantech provides industrial-grade computing hardware for digital signage including fanless media players (DS series), panel PCs, edge AI computing devices, and IoT gateways. Products are designed for 24/7 operation in commercial and industrial environments. Also offers WISE-PaaS IoT platform for device management.

name: Giada
shortDescription: Compact fanless media players for digital signage. Android and Windows-based players with 4K output, OPS modules, and edge computing options.
longDescription: Giada manufactures compact fanless media players designed for digital signage. Products include Android-based players, Windows mini PCs, OPS computing modules, and edge AI devices. Known for small form factor, low power consumption, and reliable 24/7 operation.

name: IAdea
shortDescription: Android-based media players and room scheduling panels for digital signage. Enterprise management with IAdeaCare cloud platform.
longDescription: IAdea manufactures enterprise-grade Android media players and room scheduling display panels. Products include signage media players (XMP series), room booking panels (XDS series), and the IAdeaCare cloud management platform. Used with major CMS platforms including ScreenCloud, Signagelive, and Mvix.

name: Minix
shortDescription: Compact Android and Windows mini PCs used as digital signage media players. Budget-friendly alternative to purpose-built signage players.
longDescription: Minix manufactures compact Android and Windows mini PCs that serve as cost-effective digital signage media players. Products include Android TV sticks, mini PCs, and USB-C dongles. While not purpose-built for signage, they offer a budget-friendly option for simple content playback on commercial displays.

name: MediaSignage
shortDescription: Open digital signage platform with app marketplace. StudioLite editor, SignagePlayer, and SDK for custom development.
longDescription: MediaSignage provides a digital signage platform built on open web technologies. Features include StudioLite content editor, SignagePlayer for playback, an app marketplace for extending functionality, and an SDK for custom development. Supports Windows and Android players.

name: Broadsign Direct
shortDescription: Campaign management platform for digital out-of-home networks. Proposals, contracts, scheduling, and proof-of-performance for DOOH media sales.
longDescription: Broadsign Direct is the sales and campaign management platform for DOOH network operators. Features include proposal generation, contract management, campaign scheduling, inventory management, and proof-of-performance reporting. Used by large-scale DOOH networks to manage advertiser relationships.

name: Place Exchange
shortDescription: Programmatic marketplace for out-of-home advertising. Connects OOH media owners with programmatic demand through major DSPs.
longDescription: Place Exchange operates a programmatic marketplace connecting out-of-home media owners with digital advertising demand. The SSP enables OOH and DOOH inventory to be bought programmatically through major demand-side platforms. Supports audience targeting, measurement, and attribution.

name: Hivestack
shortDescription: Full-stack programmatic digital out-of-home platform. DSP, SSP, and ad server for automated DOOH campaign buying and selling.
longDescription: Hivestack provides a full-stack programmatic DOOH platform including demand-side (DSP) for advertisers, supply-side (SSP) for media owners, and an ad server for campaign delivery. Features include real-time bidding, audience measurement, and campaign analytics across global DOOH networks.

name: AdMobilize
shortDescription: Computer vision audience analytics for digital signage. Anonymous demographic detection, attention tracking, and footfall counting.
longDescription: AdMobilize provides AI-powered audience analytics for digital signage using computer vision. Products detect anonymous demographics (age, gender), measure attention and dwell time, count foot traffic, and trigger content based on audience composition. Privacy-first approach with no PII collection.

name: Quividi
shortDescription: Audience measurement platform for digital signage and DOOH. Anonymous viewer counting, attention time, and demographic analysis.
longDescription: Quividi provides audience measurement analytics for digital signage and DOOH networks. Using cameras and AI, the platform measures anonymous viewer counts, attention time, demographic breakdowns, and emotional engagement. Data feeds into content optimization and proof-of-performance reporting.

name: Intel Smart Display Module
tagline: Intel computing modules for signage displays
shortDescription: Intel SDM (Smart Display Module) computing modules that plug into commercial displays. Standardized form factor for upgrading display computing power.
longDescription: Intel Smart Display Module (SDM) is a standardized computing module form factor that plugs into compatible commercial displays from Samsung, LG, Sharp, and others. SDM enables easy upgrade of display computing power without replacing screens. Available from Intel and OEM partners.

name: QBic Technology
tagline: Android signage players and kiosk systems
shortDescription: Android-based digital signage players and kiosk computing systems. Compact form factor with enterprise management features.
longDescription: QBic Technology manufactures Android-based digital signage players and kiosk computing systems. Products include compact media players, touch-enabled kiosk PCs, and OPS computing modules. Enterprise features include remote management, OTA updates, and watchdog timers for 24/7 operation.

name: Azulle
shortDescription: Ultra-compact Windows mini PCs and compute sticks designed for digital signage. Fanless operation with 4K output.
longDescription: Azulle manufactures ultra-compact Windows mini PCs and compute sticks designed for digital signage applications. Products include Access series (stick PCs), Byte series (mini PCs), and enterprise deployment-ready units with remote management. Fanless, silent operation with 4K HDMI output.

name: Shuttle Computer Group
tagline: Small form factor PCs for signage
shortDescription: Small form factor fanless PCs for digital signage. Industrial-grade reliability with multiple display outputs and remote management.
longDescription: Shuttle Computer Group manufactures small form factor PCs used as digital signage media players. Products include fanless DS series (designed specifically for signage), XPC slim series, and all-in-one PCs. Features include multiple display outputs, 24/7 operation rating, and remote management capabilities.

name: LG ProCentric
tagline: LG hospitality TV and signage platform
shortDescription: LG's hospitality platform for hotel TVs with digital signage capability. Guest-facing information, welcome screens, and hotel services on LG displays.
longDescription: LG ProCentric is LG's hospitality platform built into their hotel and hospitality TVs. Features include guest welcome screens, hotel information displays, room service menus, local area guides, and digital signage content. Integrates with hotel PMS (Property Management Systems) for personalized guest experiences.

name: Samsung LYNK REACH
shortDescription: Samsung's hospitality TV and signage management platform for hotels. IP-based content delivery, guest welcome, and hotel information services.
longDescription: Samsung LYNK REACH is Samsung's hospitality TV management platform enabling IP-based content delivery to hotel room TVs and public area displays. Features include guest welcome screens, hotel information channels, VOD management, and digital signage content delivery. Integrates with major hotel PMS systems.

name: Volara
shortDescription: Voice-activated digital signage and guest services for hotels. Combines voice assistants with in-room displays for hospitality experiences.
longDescription: Volara provides voice-enabled technology for the hospitality industry, combining voice assistants (Alexa for Hospitality, Google Assistant) with in-room displays and digital signage. Guests use voice commands to access hotel services, room controls, and local information. Integrates with hotel PMS and smart room systems.

name: Uniguest
tagline: Digital engagement for hospitality and senior living
shortDescription: Digital engagement platform for hotels, senior living, and cruise ships. In-room entertainment, digital signage, and interactive guest services.
longDescription: Uniguest provides digital engagement solutions for hospitality, senior living, and cruise industries. Products include in-room entertainment systems, lobby digital signage, interactive directories, and resident engagement platforms. Acquired multiple hospitality tech companies to build a comprehensive platform.

name: Otrum
tagline: Hotel digital signage and guest technology
shortDescription: Hotel technology platform combining digital signage, IPTV, casting, and guest engagement. Used by hotel chains across Europe and Middle East.
longDescription: Otrum provides hotel technology solutions combining digital signage, IPTV, Chromecast guest casting, and interactive guest services. The platform manages lobby displays, in-room screens, meeting room signage, and back-of-house communications for hotel properties.

name: SolutoApps
tagline: Digital signage apps for Samsung and LG
shortDescription: Digital signage apps for Samsung Tizen and LG webOS SoC displays. Simple setup with no external player needed.
longDescription: SolutoApps develops digital signage applications that run natively on Samsung Tizen and LG webOS commercial displays. Apps include web browser kiosk, scheduler, URL player, and RSS display. Eliminates the need for external media players by running directly on the display's built-in SoC.

name: Samsung VXT
shortDescription: Samsung's next-generation cloud CMS for Tizen displays. Drag-and-drop editor, templates, scheduling, and device management.
longDescription: Samsung VXT is Samsung's next-generation cloud-based content management system for Tizen SoC displays. Features include drag-and-drop content editor, template library, scheduling, multi-site management, and real-time device monitoring. Designed as the modern successor to MagicINFO for cloud-first deployments.

name: Planar DirectLight LED
shortDescription: Planar's fine-pitch LED video wall product line. Pixel pitches from 0.7mm for premium indoor installations. Seamless, bezel-free displays.
longDescription: Planar DirectLight is Planar's fine-pitch LED video wall product line offering pixel pitches from 0.7mm to 2.5mm. Designed for premium indoor installations where seamless, bezel-free images are required. Used in corporate lobbies, control rooms, broadcast studios, and high-end retail.

name: Vuepilot
shortDescription: Lightweight cloud digital signage for small businesses. Free tier for one screen with basic content management and scheduling.
longDescription: Vuepilot provides simple cloud-based digital signage software designed for small businesses and first-time users. Features include basic content management, scheduling, web-based player, and a free tier for one screen. Runs on any device with a web browser.

name: ScreenScape
shortDescription: Digital signage network connecting local businesses, tourism, and community organizations. Content syndication across shared screen networks.
longDescription: ScreenScape provides a community-based digital signage network that connects local businesses, tourism boards, and community organizations. Content is syndicated across shared screen networks in cafes, hotels, and public spaces. Revenue model includes content subscriptions and advertising on shared networks.

name: Scala (STRATACACHE)
shortDescription: STRATACACHE's enterprise digital signage platform. Content management, analytics, and integration tools for large-scale retail and corporate networks.
longDescription: Scala, part of STRATACACHE, is an enterprise digital experience platform deployed in 100+ countries. Features include content management with approval workflows, audience analytics, data-triggered content, POS integration, and centralized network management for thousands of screens.

name: Hikvision Digital Signage
shortDescription: Commercial LED displays, video walls, and interactive screens from the global security camera manufacturer. Competitive pricing with wide distribution.
longDescription: Hikvision, known for security cameras, also manufactures commercial LED displays, LCD video walls, interactive panels, and outdoor LED signage. Products leverage their manufacturing scale for competitive pricing. Distributed globally through their extensive security channel partner network.

name: Barco
shortDescription: Premium visualization technology including LED video walls, control room displays, and ClickShare wireless presentation. Belgian manufacturer.
longDescription: Barco manufactures premium visualization technology for enterprise and entertainment. Products include direct-view LED displays, rear-projection video walls for control rooms, ClickShare wireless presentation systems, and large-venue projectors. Known for exceptional quality and reliability in mission-critical environments.

name: Christie Digital
shortDescription: Professional projectors, LED displays, and processing for large-scale digital signage. Laser projectors, MicroTiles LED, and content management.
