longDescription: Christie Digital manufactures professional visualization technology including laser projectors, MicroTiles LED displays, LCD panels, and media servers. Products serve large-venue signage, command centers, museums, and entertainment. Christie Conductor provides network monitoring and management.

name: Epson Commercial Projectors
shortDescription: Commercial laser projectors for digital signage projection. Large-format projection for retail, museums, and architectural installations.
longDescription: Epson manufactures commercial laser projectors used for digital signage projection mapping, retail displays, museum installations, and large-venue presentations. Products include ultra-short throw projectors, high-brightness venue projectors, and 4K laser projectors.

name: Digital Projection
shortDescription: High-performance laser projectors for digital signage, simulation, and large-venue installations. 4K and 8K projection capabilities.
longDescription: Digital Projection manufactures high-performance laser projectors for digital signage, simulation, and entertainment. Products range from 5,000 to 75,000 lumens with 4K and 8K resolution options. Used in museums, theme parks, corporate experience centers, and architectural projection mapping.

name: Extron
shortDescription: AV signal processing, switching, and distribution equipment for digital signage. Matrix switches, scalers, and AV control systems.
longDescription: Extron provides AV signal processing and distribution equipment essential for complex digital signage installations. Products include HDMI/SDI matrix switches, video scalers, AV-over-IP distribution (NAV series), control systems, and cable management. Industry standard for professional AV infrastructure.

name: QSC (Q-SYS)
shortDescription: Q-SYS networked AV platform for audio, video, and control in signage installations. Software-based AV processing with open architecture.
longDescription: QSC provides the Q-SYS networked AV platform used in digital signage installations for audio distribution, video routing, and system control. The software-based platform runs on Q-SYS Core processors with open API for integration. Used alongside digital signage for complete AV experiences.

name: Prysm (now Nureva)
shortDescription: Large-format interactive video wall displays for collaboration and digital signage. Collaborative visual workspaces for enterprise.
longDescription: Nureva (which acquired Prysm's visual collaboration technology) provides large-format interactive video wall displays for enterprise collaboration spaces. Displays combine digital signage capability with touch interaction, multi-user collaboration, and remote conferencing integration.

name: Scala AdParadigm
tagline: DOOH ad serving and campaign management
shortDescription: Ad serving platform for digital out-of-home signage networks. Campaign management, proof-of-play, and revenue optimization for DOOH media owners.
longDescription: Scala AdParadigm (a STRATACACHE company) provides ad serving and campaign management for DOOH signage networks. Features include campaign scheduling, ad insertion, proof-of-play verification, revenue optimization, and integration with programmatic demand sources.

name: Toshiba (Sharp) Displays
shortDescription: Commercial displays from Sharp/Toshiba for digital signage. Windows collaboration displays, standard signage, and interactive panels.
longDescription: Sharp/Toshiba provides commercial displays for digital signage including standard signage panels, Windows collaboration displays, interactive AQUOS BOARD panels, and professional monitors. Known for reliability and integration with the broader Sharp business solutions ecosystem.

name: ClearLED
shortDescription: Transparent LED displays for retail storefronts, glass facades, and architectural installations. See-through screens that maintain natural light.
longDescription: ClearLED manufactures transparent LED display solutions for retail storefronts, glass facades, and architectural installations. Transparent panels allow natural light through while displaying vibrant content. Products range from window-mounted film to structural glass LED walls.

name: Dynamo LED Displays
shortDescription: LED display manufacturer offering indoor, outdoor, transparent, and creative LED solutions. UK-based with global installation capability.
longDescription: Dynamo LED Displays manufactures and installs LED display solutions including indoor fine-pitch, outdoor advertising, transparent LED, creative shapes, and mobile LED trucks. UK-based with global installation capability. Provides full project management from design through installation.

name: Mvix xPressCue
shortDescription: Emergency alert override system for digital signage. Instantly pushes safety messages to all screens during emergencies.
longDescription: Mvix xPressCue is an emergency alert override system for digital signage networks. One-click activation pushes emergency messages (fire, lockdown, weather, custom alerts) to all connected screens instantly. Integrates with CAP/IPAWS for automated weather alerts. Used in schools, hospitals, and corporate campuses.

name: Four Winds Interactive Engage
shortDescription: Interactive wayfinding, building directories, and visitor experience solutions for corporate campuses and healthcare facilities.
longDescription: FWI Engage (now part of Poppulo) provides interactive wayfinding and building directory solutions for corporate campuses, healthcare facilities, and educational institutions. Features include 3D maps, turn-by-turn directions, building directories, and ADA-compliant kiosk interfaces.

name: YCD Multimedia
shortDescription: Sensor-driven digital signage platform that adapts content based on audience demographics, weather, and real-time data. AI content optimization.
longDescription: YCD Multimedia provides sensor-driven digital signage that adapts content in real-time based on audience demographics (via camera analytics), weather conditions, time of day, and external data feeds. AI algorithms optimize content selection for maximum engagement and conversion.

name: Omnivex Moxie
shortDescription: Omnivex Moxie platform for displaying real-time data on digital signage. Connects to databases, APIs, and business systems for live KPI displays.
longDescription: Omnivex Moxie is a real-time data visualization platform for digital signage. Connects to enterprise databases, APIs, IoT sensors, and business systems to display live data on screens. Used for manufacturing dashboards, transportation FIDS, financial tickers, and corporate KPI displays.

name: RMG Networks
shortDescription: Enterprise workplace digital signage with internal communications, emergency alerts, and data dashboards for corporate and manufacturing environments.
longDescription: RMG Networks provides enterprise workplace digital signage solutions including internal communications, emergency alert systems, manufacturing dashboards, and multi-site management. Specializes in large corporate and manufacturing environments requiring reliable, scalable signage networks.

name: Kioware
shortDescription: Kiosk browser lockdown and management software for Windows and Android. Secures devices for self-service kiosks and digital signage.
longDescription: KioWare provides kiosk browser lockdown and device management software for Windows and Android. Features include browser lockdown (preventing user access to OS), kiosk configuration, remote management, session management, and digital signage playback. Essential software for public-facing kiosks and interactive signage.

name: SiteKiosk
shortDescription: Kiosk software combining browser lockdown with digital signage capabilities. Secure public internet terminals, self-service kiosks, and info displays.
longDescription: SiteKiosk provides combined kiosk lockdown and digital signage software for Windows and Android. Features include secure browser lockdown, digital signage content playback, remote management, usage statistics, and customizable start screens. Used for public internet terminals, self-service kiosks, and information displays.

name: Samsung Flip
shortDescription: Samsung's interactive digital whiteboard for meeting rooms and collaboration. Touch display with real-time collaboration and screen sharing.
longDescription: Samsung Flip is an interactive digital whiteboard display designed for meeting rooms and collaborative workspaces. Features include multi-user touch writing, real-time collaboration, screen sharing, USB-C connectivity, and Samsung Tizen platform for signage content when not in whiteboard mode.

name: CoolSign (Haivision)
shortDescription: Enterprise digital signage CMS by Haivision. Scalable content management with video streaming integration for large corporate networks.
longDescription: CoolSign, a Haivision product, provides enterprise digital signage with integrated video streaming capabilities. Features include content management, scheduling, live video integration, multi-zone layouts, and scalable architecture for large corporate and campus deployments. Leverages Haivision's video encoding expertise.

name: Sharp AQUOS BOARD
shortDescription: Sharp's interactive display platform for meetings, classrooms, and collaboration. Windows-based with multi-touch and pen input.
longDescription: Sharp AQUOS BOARD provides interactive display solutions for corporate meeting rooms and education. Products feature Windows-based computing, multi-touch input, pen writing, wireless screen sharing, and video conferencing integration. Available in sizes from 50 to 86 inches.

name: Vestel Visual Solutions
tagline: Commercial displays from Turkey's largest manufacturer
shortDescription: Commercial displays, LED video walls, and interactive panels. Turkey-based manufacturer with competitive pricing for European and global markets.
longDescription: Vestel Visual Solutions manufactures commercial displays, LED video walls, and interactive panels. As Turkey's largest electronics manufacturer, Vestel offers competitive pricing with European distribution. Product lines include standard signage, outdoor displays, video wall panels, and interactive touch screens.

name: ZetaDisplay
tagline: Digital signage solutions for retail and workplace
shortDescription: European digital signage company providing software, content, and managed services for retail and workplace environments. Scandinavian heritage.
longDescription: ZetaDisplay is a European digital signage company headquartered in Sweden providing end-to-end solutions including software, content creation, hardware, and managed services. Specializes in retail in-store communication and workplace digital displays across Scandinavia and Europe.

name: Stampede Presentation Products
shortDescription: Value-added distributor of AV and digital signage products. Carries displays, media players, mounts, and accessories from multiple manufacturers.
longDescription: Stampede is a value-added distributor specializing in AV and digital signage products. Carries products from Samsung, LG, NEC, BrightSign, Chief, and dozens of other brands. Provides dealer programs, technical support, and logistics services for AV integrators and resellers.

name: SYNNEX (TD SYNNEX)
shortDescription: Global IT distributor carrying digital signage hardware from Samsung, LG, BrightSign, and others. Volume pricing and logistics for large deployments.
longDescription: TD SYNNEX is one of the world's largest IT distributors, carrying digital signage products from Samsung, LG, NEC, BrightSign, Planar, and others. Provides volume pricing, logistics, configuration services, and financing for large-scale digital signage deployments.

name: Ingram Micro AV
shortDescription: Global technology distributor with AV and digital signage division. Carries displays, players, mounts, and software from all major brands.
longDescription: Ingram Micro's AV division provides technology distribution for digital signage products from all major manufacturers. Services include inventory management, configuration, deployment assistance, and financing. Operates globally with regional warehouses for rapid delivery.

name: Almo Pro AV
shortDescription: Value-added AV distributor specializing in digital signage. Samsung, LG, NEC authorized dealer with design assistance and training programs.
longDescription: Almo Professional AV is a value-added distributor of professional AV and digital signage products. Carries products from Samsung, LG, Sharp NEC, BrightSign, and others. Offers system design assistance, training programs (E4 Experience events), and marketing support for AV integrators.

name: Content Guru
shortDescription: Content creation and management services for digital signage. Ongoing content programs with design, scheduling, and performance tracking.
longDescription: Content Guru provides professional content creation and management services for digital signage networks. Services include brand-aligned design, motion graphics, video production, content scheduling, and performance tracking. Offers ongoing content programs to prevent content stagnation.

name: Visix AxisTV
shortDescription: Visix AxisTV Signage Suite for campus digital signage management. Room signs, directories, event boards, and emergency alerts.
longDescription: AxisTV Signage Suite is Visix's flagship digital signage CMS designed for campus environments. Features include room scheduling displays, building directories, event boards, emergency alert integration (CAP/IPAWS), data-driven content, and multi-campus management. Used by universities, hospitals, and corporate campuses.

name: UCView IPTV
shortDescription: IPTV distribution system for hospitals and hotels. Combines live TV channels with digital signage content on patient and guest room TVs.
longDescription: UCView IPTV provides live television distribution combined with digital signage for hospitals and hospitality. The system delivers cable TV channels over IP network to patient room and guest room TVs, with digital signage content displayed between channels and during channel surfing.

name: Mvision
shortDescription: Digital signage solutions for Latin American markets. Software, hardware, and integration services with Spanish-language support.
longDescription: Mvision provides digital signage solutions tailored for Latin American markets. Offers CMS software, hardware supply, installation services, and content creation with full Spanish-language support. Serves retail, corporate, and banking sectors across Mexico, Colombia, Brazil, and other Latin American countries.

name: Signagelive Studio
shortDescription: Built-in content creation studio for the Signagelive platform. Templates, widgets, and design tools for non-designers to create signage content.
longDescription: Signagelive Studio is the built-in content creation tool for the Signagelive CMS platform. Features include drag-and-drop editor, template library, widget marketplace, data-driven content tools, and multi-zone layout designer. Enables non-designers to create professional signage content.

name: Canva for Digital Signage
tagline: Design tool with digital signage templates
shortDescription: Canva's design platform with digital signage templates and export capabilities. Create signage content with drag-and-drop design tools.
longDescription: Canva provides a design platform widely used for creating digital signage content. Features include thousands of signage-specific templates, drag-and-drop editor, brand kit management, team collaboration, and export in formats compatible with all major CMS platforms. Many CMS platforms offer direct Canva integration.

name: InfoComm (AVIXA)
shortDescription: AVIXA (Audiovisual and Integrated Experience Association) represents the global AV industry. InfoComm trade show, CTS certification, and market research.
longDescription: AVIXA is the trade association for the professional AV industry including digital signage. Produces the InfoComm trade show (the largest AV event globally), CTS (Certified Technology Specialist) certification program, market research (IOTA reports), and industry standards. Essential networking and education resource.

name: ISE (Integrated Systems Europe)
tagline: World's leading AV and systems integration show
shortDescription: Integrated Systems Europe trade show — the world's largest AV exhibition. Digital signage vendors, integrators, and end users converge annually in Barcelona.
longDescription: ISE (Integrated Systems Europe) is the world's largest trade show for professional AV and systems integration. Held annually in Barcelona, it features exhibitions from all major digital signage vendors, conference sessions, live demos, and networking. Essential event for anyone in the digital signage industry.

name: DSE (Digital Signage Expo)
shortDescription: Digital Signage Expo — the industry-specific trade show for digital signage in North America. Now part of InfoComm.
longDescription: DSE (Digital Signage Expo) was the premier industry trade show dedicated to digital signage in North America. Now integrated into the InfoComm show produced by AVIXA. Featured dedicated digital signage exhibition space, educational sessions, and the APEX awards for excellence in digital signage.

name: Digital Signage Magazine
shortDescription: Industry publication covering digital signage technology, case studies, vendor profiles, and market trends for the global signage market.
longDescription: Digital Signage Magazine is an industry publication providing news, case studies, technology reviews, and market analysis for the digital signage industry. Covers software, hardware, content, integration, and DOOH sectors with editorial content, webinars, and annual technology guides.

name: DigitalSignagePortal (DSP)
shortDescription: White-label digital signage software platform for resellers and integrators. Build your own branded signage solution on DSP's infrastructure.
longDescription: DigitalSignagePortal (DSP) provides a white-label digital signage platform enabling AV integrators and resellers to offer branded signage solutions. Features include content management, device management, scheduling, and analytics — all rebrandable under the partner's name. Used by dozens of regional signage providers.

name: SignageTube
shortDescription: Digital signage for Google Chrome devices. Simple content management with Google Drive integration for Chromebox and Chromebit players.
longDescription: SignageTube provides digital signage software designed for Google Chrome devices. Content is stored in Google Drive and displayed through Chrome OS kiosk mode. Features include scheduling, templates, multi-screen management, and Google Workspace integration.

name: Hexnode UEM
shortDescription: Unified endpoint management with digital signage kiosk mode. Lock down Android, iOS, and Windows devices into kiosk or signage mode remotely.
longDescription: Hexnode provides unified endpoint management (UEM) with kiosk lockdown capabilities used for digital signage. Features include remote device enrollment, kiosk mode configuration, app management, content distribution, and security policies. Supports Android, iOS, Windows, and Chrome OS devices.

name: Scalable Display Technologies
shortDescription: Automatic calibration software for multi-projector and video wall signage. Eliminates manual alignment for large-format projection mapping.
longDescription: Scalable Display Technologies provides automatic calibration software for multi-projector displays and video walls. The software uses cameras to automatically align, blend, and warp multiple projectors into a seamless image. Essential for projection mapping, dome displays, and large-format signage installations.

name: Vibenomics
shortDescription: In-store audio advertising and digital signage platform for retail. Programmatic audio ads combined with visual signage content for in-store media.
longDescription: Vibenomics provides in-store audio advertising combined with digital signage for retail environments. The platform enables programmatic audio ad insertion alongside visual signage content, creating a coordinated in-store media experience. Now part of Mood Media's retail media network.

name: Carousel Digital Signage
shortDescription: Carousel enterprise digital signage CMS by Tightrope Media Systems. Multi-channel content management with IPTV integration.
longDescription: Carousel is Tightrope Media Systems' enterprise digital signage CMS. Features include multi-channel content management, IPTV integration, data-driven content, emergency alert override, and centralized management for large campus deployments. Used by hospitals, universities, and government facilities.

name: Four Winds Digital
shortDescription: Digital signage consulting firm providing vendor-neutral strategy, technology assessment, and deployment planning for enterprise buyers.
longDescription: Four Winds Digital provides vendor-neutral digital signage consulting for enterprise buyers. Services include needs assessment, technology evaluation, vendor selection, RFP management, project planning, and deployment oversight. Helps organizations navigate the complex signage vendor landscape.

name: Retail Smart
shortDescription: Retail technology consulting firm specializing in digital signage, in-store media, and customer experience technology for multi-location retailers.
longDescription: Retail Smart provides technology consulting for multi-location retailers implementing digital signage, in-store media networks, and customer experience technology. Services include strategy development, technology selection, ROI modeling, pilot design, and rollout management.

name: RMG Connect
shortDescription: Managed services for digital signage networks. 24/7 monitoring, content management, hardware maintenance, and help desk support.
longDescription: RMG Connect provides managed services for enterprise digital signage networks including 24/7 network monitoring, content management, hardware maintenance, trouble ticket resolution, and help desk support. Enables organizations to outsource signage operations while maintaining internal content control.

name: Arya CMS (SpinetiX)
shortDescription: SpinetiX ARYA cloud CMS for managing digital signage content on SpinetiX HMP players. Drag-and-drop editor with templates and scheduling.
longDescription: ARYA is SpinetiX's cloud-based CMS for managing digital signage content. Features include drag-and-drop content editor, template library, scheduling, multi-site management, and device monitoring for SpinetiX HMP players. Provides a modern cloud interface for SpinetiX's enterprise-grade hardware.

name: Popshap
shortDescription: Interactive touch screen kiosk manufacturer for events, retail, and corporate lobbies. Photo booths, wayfinding, and self-service kiosks.
longDescription: Popshap manufactures interactive touch screen kiosks for events, retail, corporate lobbies, and trade shows. Products include photo booth kiosks, wayfinding displays, product catalog browsers, and self-service stations. Offers rental and purchase options with content management software.

name: Convergent AV
shortDescription: AV integration services for digital signage, video conferencing, and corporate AV. Design, installation, and ongoing support.
longDescription: Convergent AV provides professional AV integration services including digital signage design, video wall installation, meeting room AV, and ongoing managed support. Serves corporate, education, and healthcare clients with comprehensive project management from design through commissioning.
